title: tridens grandiflorus
intro: Tridens grandiflorus, also known as the bigflower tridens, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tridens grandiflorus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and wounds, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Tridens grandiflorus can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in folk medicine in various parts of the world.
